text.title: django-serializers Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to design Input + Output serializers around an existing or new DRF endpoint.

step.name: identify-endpoint
step.input: URL + verb + business operation it performs
step.action: Decide whether the endpoint accepts data (POST/PUT/PATCH), returns data (GET), or both. Identify the Model under change.
step.decision-gate: If purely internal helper (no HTTP boundary), skip this methodology.

step.name: design-input
step.action: Create `EntityCreateRequest(serializers.Serializer)` and/or `EntityUpdateRequest`. List each field with explicit `required`, `allow_blank`, `allow_null`, `default`, `write_only`. Add `validate_<field>` ONLY for shape/format (regex, range).
step.decision-gate: No DB queries, no service calls inside validate(); ruff/AST validator passes.

step.name: design-output
step.input: fields safe to expose on the model
step.action: Create `EntityResponse(serializers.Serializer)` listing exposed fields explicitly. Use `read_only=True` on every field. For nested data, declare `<Related>Response(many=True, read_only=True)` and ensure the parent QuerySet is provided by a selector with the right prefetches.
step.decision-gate: Field list does NOT include sensitive names (`password`, `secret`, `token`, `is_staff`, `mfa_*`).

step.name: wire-view
step.action: In the view: `serializer = EntityCreateRequest(data=request.data); serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True); entity = services.entity_create(**serializer.validated_data); return Response(EntityResponse(entity).data, status=201)`. List views fetch via selector and wrap with `EntityListResponse(qs, many=True)`.
step.output: view returning the right shape with consistent 400/201 handling
step.decision-gate: Service is the only place that mutates DB.

step.name: test
step.action: Add pytest covering: (a) malformed input â†’ 400 with field-level errors, (b) happy path â†’ 201 + Output shape matches schema, (c) PII fields absent from response body (`"password" not in resp.json()`).
step.output: regression test guarding both shape and PII boundary
step.decision-gate: All three tests pass; deliberately add a sensitive field to Output â†’ PII test fails.
